Soil/Rock Description: Rounded to subrounded COBBLES and fine to coarse GRAVEL and CONCRETE. No recovery reported. (fill material washed out) (FILL)

Moderately strong, brownish grey, mottled grey, medium to decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with very closely spaced, moderately narrow to narrow, rough to undulating, biotite and manganese stained joints, dipping 30° to 35° and occasional subvertical.

Strong to moderately strong, pinkish grey, mottled black and white, medium to moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, moderately narrow to extremely narrow, rough to undulating, biotite stained joints, dipping 5° to 10°.
